Name: It’s a Wonderful World

The players pass the rest of the cards t: The players pass the rest of the cards to the left
The players pass the rest of the cards to the right
You must slate for construction or recyc: You must slate for construction or recycle each card in your draft area
Place your resources on your development: Place your resources on your developments under construction or your Empire card

You receive a {character, select, Financ: You receive a {character, select, Financier{Financier} other{General}} for your {resource, select, Materials{Materials} Energy{Energy} Science{Science} Gold{Gold} other{Exploration}} production supremacy
{player} receives a {character, select,: {player} receives a {character, select, Financier{Financier} other{General}} for producing the most {resource, select, Materials{Materials} Energy{Energy} Science{Science} Gold{Gold} other{Exploration}}
Receive a Financier <0/> or a General <1: Receive a Financier <0/> or a General <1/> (Science Supremacy Bonus)

Click on <0>Validate</0> to proceed to t: Click on <0>Validate</0> to proceed to the calculation of the scores
The other players must use the resources: The other players must use the resources produced

Score calculation… Who will be the Supre: Score calculation… Who will be the Supreme Leader?
Victory! You win the game with {score} p: Victory! You win the game with {score} points

Victory! You win the game with {score} p: Victory! You win the game with {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
{player} wins the game with {score} poin: {player} wins the game with {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters
Perfect tie! All players each have {scor: Perfect tie! All players each have {score} points, {developments} developments and {characters} characters

The player producing the single most Mat: The player producing the single most Materials receives a Financier token
The player producing the single most Ene: The player producing the single most Energy receives a General token
The player producing the single most Sci: The player producing the single most Science receives a Financier or General token
The player producing the single most Gol: The player producing the single most Gold receives a Financier token
The player producing the single most Exp: The player producing the single most Exploration receives a General token
There is {discardLength} cards in the di: There is {discardLength} cards in the discard pile.
You can still build a card. Are you sure: You can still build a card. Are you sure you want to finish the game without building it?
Number of copies in the game: Number of copies in the game
Welcome to It’ s a Wonderful World tutor: Welcome to It’ s a Wonderful World tutorial
In It’s a Wonderful World, you are leadi: In It’s a Wonderful World, you are leading an expanding Empire. You must choose the path that will get you to develop faster and better than your competitors!
This is your Empire: the Noram States.
In this tutorial, you play against 2 opp: In this tutorial, you play against 2 opponents controlled by the machine: the Republic of Europe and Federation of Asia.
The game consists of choosing and buildi: The game consists of choosing and building Development cards. Some of these cards earn victory points. The player with the most victory points at the end of the game wins!
A game is played in 4 rounds. We will gu: A game is played in 4 rounds. We will guide you through the first round to teach you how to play, then you will be free to make your own choices!
A round consists of 3 phases that player: A round consists of 3 phases that players play simultaneously: Draft, Planning and Production.
Each player receives 7 cards. You must c: Each player receives 7 cards. You must choose 1 card and pass the rest to the Republic of Europe.
Move the Secret Society to your draft ar: Move the Secret Society to your draft area. We will see later why this card is strategic for you.
As you can see, the Asian Federation has: As you can see, the Asian Federation has passed you 6 cards. The players choose 1 card simultaneously and pass the rest to the next player.
These arrows indicate the direction of t: These arrows indicate the direction of the cards for this round.
This card will provide you with a good s: This card will provide you with a good start.
Some cards produce resources once built. For example, the Industrial Complex will produce a gray resource (Materials) and a yellow one (Gold).
The resources will allow you to build th: The resources will allow you to build the cards. For example, the Industrial Complex costs 3 Materials (in grey) and one Energy (in black).
Fortunately, you don’t start without pro: Fortunately, you don’t start without production! Your Empire will produce 3 Materials and 1 Gold every round.
Thanks to this card, you will be able to: Thanks to this card, you will be able to produce more and more Gold!
Once built, the Propaganda Center will p: Once built, the Propaganda Center will produce as much Gold as you have yellow cards built.
The Secret Society and the Propaganda Ce: The Secret Society and the Propaganda Center are both yellow cards. The symbol at the bottom right of the cards is a reminder of their type.
It is expensive to build (5 Gold), but i: It is expensive to build (5 Gold), but it will then produce a lot each turn (2 Materials and 2 Gold).
This card is not necessarily interesting: This card is not necessarily interesting to build, but we will be able to make good use of it anyway!
During Planning, each card can offer you: During Planning, each card can offer you a resource if you discard it. For the Wind Turbine, it is an Energy, it is indicated here.
It’s a good thing: we lacked one Energy: It’s a good thing: we lacked one Energy to build the Industrial Complex!
As with the Wind Turbine, we will be abl: As with the Wind Turbine, we will be able to recycle this card, but this time to win one Gold.
You have automatically retrieved the las: You have automatically retrieved the last card passed by the Asian Federation, a Zeppelin.
We now move on to the second phase of th: We now move on to the second phase of the round, the Planning: each card chosen in the previous phase must be put under construction or recycled.
Let’s start with the Industrial Complex: Let’s start with the Industrial Complex
We want to build this card. So move it t: We want to build this card. So move it to the Construction Area.
Start the construction of the Propaganda: Start the construction of the Propaganda Center.
Also slate the Propaganda Center into th: Also slate the Propaganda Center into the Construction Area.
At this location, you can see that the P: At this location, you can see that the Propaganda Center earns 1 victory point at the end of the game, if built.
Put the Harbor Zone under Construction: Put the Harbor Zone under Construction
Once built, this card will produce 2 Mat: Once built, this card will produce 2 Materials and 2 Gold each turn, but will also yield 2 victory points at the end of the game.
Another way to score victory points is t: Another way to score victory points is to accumulate Financiers and Generals. Each brings 1 point.
Your Empire gives you a strategic bonus:: Your Empire gives you a strategic bonus: each Financier token earns you an extra point!
Start the Construction of the Secret Soc: Start the Construction of the Secret Society
The Secret Society fits perfectly into y: The Secret Society fits perfectly into your strategy, since once built it will also earn you 1 point per Financial token: put it under construction.
This card earns 3 victory points per gre: This card earns 3 victory points per green building built.
However, to build it we would have to sp: However, to build it we would have to spend 2 precious Financiers!
Slide this card to the Recycling Zone, a: Slide this card to the Recycling Zone, above the Construction Zone: it will be more useful this way.
By recycling the Universal Exposition du: By recycling the Universal Exposition during the Planning phase, we obtained an Gold that can be used immediately.
Place the Gold on the Propaganda Center: Place the Gold on the Propaganda Center
Drag this yellow cube to your Propaganda: Drag this yellow cube to your Propaganda Center to start building it.
You only need 2 more Gold to complete th: You only need 2 more Gold to complete the construction of the Propaganda Center.
Now slide the Wind Turbine to the recycl: Now slide the Wind Turbine to the recycling area, to get a black cube this time.
Place the Energy on the Industrial Compl: Place the Energy on the Industrial Complex
Now slide the black cube, obtained by re: Now slide the black cube, obtained by recycling the Wind Turbine, to the Industrial Complex.
This card costs 2 Energy (which you do n: This card costs 2 Energy (which you do not produce) and produces 1 blue cube (the Exploration), not very useful for our strategy: recycle it.
By recycling the Zeppelin, you get a blu: By recycling the Zeppelin, you get a blue cube. However, none of your cards under construction need this resource.
A resource that cannot be used immediate: A resource that cannot be used immediately must be placed here on your Empire card.
The Resources on your Empire card can no: The Resources on your Empire card can no longer be used to build Development cards.
However, if there are 5 cubes on your Em: However, if there are 5 cubes on your Empire card (regardless of their color), they are converted into 1 red cube, the Krystallium.
The Krystallium can replace any cube to: The Krystallium can replace any cube to build a card, and can be used at any time.
Some cards, such as the Secret Society,: Some cards, such as the Secret Society, require Krystallium to be built.
You must click on Validate to indicate t: You must click on Validate to indicate to the other players that you have completed your planning.
The production phase takes place in 5 st: The production phase takes place in 5 stages: one per resource, in the order of the production line: grey, black, green, yellow and finally blue.
All players start by producing Materials: All players start by producing Materials. You produce 3 of them, which are available here.
At each Production step, the Empire that: At each Production step, the Empire that produces the most wins a General or a Financier. You produce the most Materials, so you win a Financier token!
Here is your token. As a reminder, it gi: Here is your token. As a reminder, it gives you 1 victory point, + 1 thanks to your Empire. Once the Secret Society is built, it will be 1 additional point per Financier.
Your 3 Materials will allow us to comple: Your 3 Materials will allow us to complete the construction of the Industrial Complex.
Several options are available to you: dr: Several options are available to you: drag the card to the left, click and hold on the card, move the cubes one by one, or click on the card to zoom in and see all the available actions.
The Industrial Complex is now part of yo: The Industrial Complex is now part of your Empire, and increases your production by 1 Material and 1 Gold.
The Material production step has already: The Material production step has already started, so it’s too late to produce an additional Material this round, but you will benefit from it during the 3 remaining rounds.
On the other hand, the Gold production s: On the other hand, the Gold production step hasn’t started yet, so you’ll get an extra Gold starting this round!
In addition, by completing the construct: In addition, by completing the construction of certain cards, you can win a bonus indicated here: you earned a second Financier token!
Once you have placed all your resources,: Once you have placed all your resources, you must validate to let other players know that you are ready.
The player producing the most Energy win: The player producing the most Energy wins a General token. However, your 2 opponents are tied: in this case, no one wins a token.
At any time you can recycle a card from: At any time you can recycle a card from your Construction Zone. However, the cubes placed on it will be lost and its recycling bonus must be put on your Empire card.
Actions such as recycling a card or plac: Actions such as recycling a card or placing a Krystallium to complete a construction are possible at any time. You must therefore validate your turn at each production step, even if you don’t produce anything!
The player with the most Science can cho: The player with the most Science can choose either a Financier Tokens or a General Token. Here, the Republic of Europa has taken a General.
Although you are not producing Science,: Although you are not producing Science, you still have to validate again.
You produce 2 Gold (one thanks to your E: You produce 2 Gold (one thanks to your Empire and one thanks to the Industrial Complex).
You can always choose to place your reso: You can always choose to place your resources on your Empire card; however the Krystallium does not earn points at the end of the game.
It is better to build your cards: place: It is better to build your cards: place your Gold on your Propaganda Center.
The Federation of Asia produces 1 Gold m: The Federation of Asia produces 1 Gold more than you and therefore receives the Financier token. Try to produce more next rounds to win the Supremacy bonus!
Your new Gold production comes too late: Your new Gold production comes too late for this round, but will benefit you in future rounds.
By completing the construction of the Pr: By completing the construction of the Propaganda Center, you have won a General, which will give you 1 victory point at the end of the game.
As usual, validate to proceed to the nex: As usual, validate to proceed to the next step.
The total production of each player is d: The total production of each player is displayed here. You will produce at least 4 Materials and 3 Gold in the next round!
You do not produce any Exploration. Vali: You do not produce any Exploration. Validate now to proceed to the next round.
We are now in round 2, and a new Draft p: We are now in round 2, and a new Draft phase begins. The direction of the cards is reversed every turn.
You have until the end of the game to co: You have until the end of the game to complete the construction of your cards. Try to build the Harbor Zone quickly, to benefit from its production! The Secret Society does not produce anything, you can safely wait until turn 4 to finish it.
In the menu, the [↺] button allows you t: In the menu, the [↺] button allows you to undo your last move: it is displayed in red when it is allowed.
Keep an eye on your opponents: Keep an eye on your opponents
By clicking on your opponents, you can s: By clicking on your opponents, you can see their Empire. "If you know your enemies and know yourself, you will not be imperiled in a hundred battles." - Sun Tzu
You can now finish the game by making yo: You can now finish the game by making your own choices. Good luck!
For information, in a 2-player game, eac: For information, in a 2-player game, each player receives 10 cards for the draft. However, the last 3 cards not chosen are discarded.
This is the last round! It’s time to sco: This is the last round! It’s time to score as many victory points as possible. As a reminder, Krystallium does not score points at the end.
You have finished your first game! You c: You have finished your first game! You can now play with your friends, or meet other players via our chat room on Discord.
Tutorial: choose the card {card} and pla: Tutorial: choose the card {card} and place it to your draft area
Tutorial: select the card {card} and pla: Tutorial: select the card {card} and place it to your construction area
Tutorial: select the card {card} and rec: Tutorial: select the card {card} and recycle it
Tutorial: place your resources on the {c: Tutorial: place your resources on the {card} card
When you leave the game, you will be eli: When you leave the game, you will be eliminated and the other players will finish without you.
Out of respect for other players, only a: Out of respect for other players, only abandon the game in case of force majeure.
Game Park is evolving! You must subscrib: Game Park is evolving! You must subscribe to offer a rematch and invite everyone to play friendly games.
The ideal resolution for playing is in l: The ideal resolution for playing is in landscape mode, in 16:9.
Your offer was sent to the other players: Your offer was sent to the other players
Click the following link to go to the ne: Click the following link to go to the new game:
Made others wait (weighted by the number: Made others wait (weighted by the number of awaited players)
sign-in-to-chat: You must sign in to chat
failure.dialog.network: An action could not be completed and was canceled. Are you still connected to the Internet?
failure.dialog.play: The action you played is not allowed.
failure.dialog.play2: If the issue remains, try to <0>reload the game</0>
failure.dialog.undo: The other players have already played, your move could not be canceled.
Move not expected in the tutorial: Move not expected in the tutorial
failure.dialog.tutorial: You will soon be free to make your own choices! Let us show you the last information...
give-up.dialog.p1: You will be eliminated and replaced by a robot playing at random.
give-up.dialog.p2: The game will count as an overall loss.
give-up.dialog.p3: Your friends will be able to finish the game without you.
eject.dialog.p2: Beyond {duration} you will be allowed to eject them and continue the game.
eject.dialog.p3: If you don’t think they are coming back, you have the option of ejecting them from the game.
fs.dialog.p1: This game is designed for landscape mode, we recommend to flip your screen.
